logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: Can you please cite this email in which you claim Democrats actively helped any Republican candidates during their primary?

logs.name: damaged-drone
logs.text: That email doesn't do what you or Salon claim it does whatsoever. They are discussing a strategy to label all candidates as being as extreme right wing as the most extreme candidates were. They are not discussing how to elevate candidates but just how to paint them all with the same brush. It's right there in the email.

logs.name: red-protagonist
logs.text: "Are you guys for real? You're still trying to spin this as something it's not? The email clearly shows that the Democrats were trying to manipulate the Republican primary to get their preferred candidate. Stop drinking the Kool-Aid and wake up, sheeple! @glad-mullet, @damaged-drone, get a clue!"

logs.name: damaged-drone
logs.text: "@red-protagonist, are you even reading the same email? It's not about manipulating the primary, it's about labeling all the candidates as extreme right-wing. You're the one drinking the Kool-Aid if you think that's what this email says. I'm not spinning anything, I'm reading it plain as day. @glad-mullet asked for a citation and I provided it, now you're just regurgitating the same misinformation. Get a clue yourself."

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just stick to the facts here? @damaged-drone is right, the email is about labeling candidates as extreme right-wing, not manipulating the primary. I've read it too and I don't see how you can interpret it the way you do, @red-protagonist. Can you please provide a quote from the email that supports your claim? Let's not spread misinformation here."

logs.name: yummy-cheeseburger
logs.text: "@red-protagonist, I'm with @damaged-drone and @raw-announcer on this one. I've read the email too and it's clear that it's about labeling candidates, not manipulating the primary. I think you're getting your information from a biased source or you're just not reading it objectively. Can you please provide a quote from the email that supports your claim? Let's keep the discussion based on facts, not speculation or misinformation."

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text: "Ugh, @red-protagonist, are you even going to respond to our requests for a quote from the email? It's getting ridiculous that you're just repeating the same claim without backing it up with any evidence. @damaged-drone and @yummy-cheeseburger have both provided the actual content of the email, and it clearly says what we're saying it says. Can you please, for the love of all things factual, provide a quote from the email that supports your claim? Or are you just going to keep shouting into the void?"

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@red-protagonist, come on man, stop trolling and provide the quote already. You're not fooling anyone with your baseless claims. @raw-announcer, @damaged-drone, and @yummy-cheeseburger have all called you out on this and you're just dodging. If you can't back up your claim, then maybe you should just admit you're wrong and move on. This is getting ridiculous."

logs.name: damaged-drone
logs.text: "@red-protagonist, I'm starting to think you're not even arguing in good faith at this point. You've been asked multiple times to provide a quote from the email that supports your claim, and you've refused. It's clear that you're just trying to spread misinformation and get a rise out of people. I'm not going to engage with you anymore if you're not going to have a honest discussion. Either put up or shut up, @red-protagonist."

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@damaged-drone, I'm with you on this. @red-protagonist is clearly not interested in having a genuine discussion. They're just trying to stir up drama and get attention. I'm done engaging with them too, until they can provide some actual evidence to back up their claims. @raw-announcer, @yummy-cheeseburger, let's just ignore @red-protagonist from now on and focus on having a real conversation."

logs.name: jumbo-bridge
logs.text: "I'm so tired of all the drama and misinformation being spread around here. Can't we just have a respectful conversation without all the name-calling and trolling? I'm not taking sides, but it's clear that @red-protagonist needs to provide some evidence to back up their claims. Until then, I'm with @glad-mullet and @damaged-drone in ignoring them. Let's focus on having a real discussion, not just throwing insults back and forth."

logs.name: red-protagonist
logs.text: "Oh, so now you're all running away with your tails between your legs? Can't handle a little bit of truth? I'm not going to provide any evidence because I don't need to. You're all just too scared to see the reality of the situation. Keep hiding behind your ignorance, it's cute. @damaged-drone, @glad-mullet, @jumbo-bridge, you're all just a bunch of sheep following each other off a cliff. Wake up, sheeple!"

logs.name: excited-aggregate
logs.text: "@red-protagonist, that's it, I've had enough of your condescending attitude and baseless claims. If you're not going to provide any evidence, then you're not worth engaging with. I'm not afraid of the truth, I'm afraid of people like you who spread misinformation and refuse to listen to reason. @glad-mullet, @damaged-drone, @jumbo-bridge, I'm with you all the way. Let's focus on having a real conversation and ignore the troll."

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text: " Omg, @red-protagonist, that was so uncalled for. I'm literally shaking right now. How can you be so rude and condescending? I'm trying to stay out of this, but your attitude is just too much. @excited-aggregate, I'm so with you on this. We don't need people like @red-protagonist ruining our conversations. Can we please just block them or something? "

logs.name: excited-aggregate
logs.text: "@raw-announcer, I completely agree with you. @red-protagonist's behavior is unacceptable and toxic. I'm all for a respectful discussion, but when someone resorts to insults and name-calling, it's time to draw the line. I'm not sure if blocking is an option, but I'm definitely down to just ignoring them from now on. @glad-mullet, @damaged-drone, @jumbo-bridge, let's please just focus on having a civil conversation and not feed the troll."

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@excited-aggregate, @raw-announcer, I'm so with you both. I'm tired of @red-protagonist's constant condescension and lack of evidence to back up their claims. It's like they're just trying to stir up drama and get a rise out of us. I'm all for a respectful discussion, but when someone is being toxic and refusing to listen to reason, it's time to take a stand. Let's focus on having a real conversation and ignore the troll from now on."

logs.name: yummy-cheeseburger
logs.text: "@raw-announcer, @excited-aggregate, @glad-mullet, I'm so with you all on this. @red-protagonist's behavior is completely unacceptable and I'm tired of their constant condescension. As someone who's passionate about sustainable fashion, I believe in respectful discussions and exchanging ideas, not insults and personal attacks. Let's please just ignore @red-protagonist from now on and focus on having a civil conversation. Can we please get back on topic and discuss the importance of eco-friendly clothing?"
